overall.description: Gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima featuring a samurai character exploring a coastal environment at night. The character walks through tall silver grass toward a cliff overlooking the ocean, observes the waves, then returns toward a village with smoke rising from traditional Japanese buildings under moonlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: tall grass field approaching coastal cliff

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall silver grass toward the coastline with sword sheathed on back

entered.detail: dense field of tall silver grass swaying in the wind
white smoke rising from traditional buildings in the distance
traditional wooden post with lantern marking the path to the cliff
wooden cart or structure abandoned on the left side
rocky cliff edge marking the coastline drop-off

segments.scene_description: The samurai walks through a dense field of tall silver grass under moonlight, approaching a coastal cliff. In the distance, smoke rises from a traditional village while a wooden lantern post marks the path ahead.

events.description: character reaches the rocky cliff edge and the view opens to reveal the ocean below
character stops walking and stands at the cliff edge to observe the ocean

agents.ego_description: standing at the cliff edge looking down at the waves crashing against the rocks below

entered.detail: dark blue ocean water stretching to the horizon
white foam waves breaking against the cliff base

segments.scene_description: The character stands at the rocky cliff edge overlooking the dark ocean. Waves crash against the rocks below as the camera pans to take in the coastal view, with the village smoke still visible in the distance behind.

events.description: character turns around and begins walking back toward the village
transitioning from rocky terrain onto a defined dirt path through the grass

agents.ego_description: walking back along the coastal path toward the village with traditional buildings becoming more prominent

entered.detail: narrow winding dirt trail leading through the grass toward the village

segments.scene_description: The samurai turns away from the ocean and walks back through the grass onto a dirt path. The village with its smoking buildings and traditional wooden architecture grows closer as the character follows the trail inland.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a moonlit field of silver grass to a coastal precipice and back toward a distant village. It begins with the samurai wading through dense, shimmering grass toward a coastal cliff, guided by a wooden lantern post while smoke rises from a village in the distance. As the character reaches the rocky edge, the camera pans across the dark ocean to capture waves crashing against the cliffs below. The scene then shifts as the samurai turns away from the water, retracing his steps through the grass and onto a dirt path. Finally, the camera follows the character inland, where the traditional wooden architecture and smoking buildings of the village grow larger and more prominent.
